escalation.rationale: Killing of Iran's security chief Ali Larijani and new Israeli ground operations in Lebanon mark significant escalation in US-Israel war against Iran.

ticker_items: Iran security chief Ali Larijani killed in Israeli overnight strike
Israel launches new ground operations in Lebanon displacing 1M
Trump seeks NATO help reopening blocked Strait of Hormuz
US counterterrorism director resigns over Iran war policy
Iranian attack on South Pars gasfield threatens Gulf energy

middle_east.description: Iranian missile attack on central Israel kills 2 people and damages Tel Aviv train station.
Israeli airstrike flattens residential building in central Beirut, killing 6.
Iranian attack sets massive natural gas field ablaze in UAE.
Pakistani airstrikes hit hospital in Kabul, Afghanistan claims 400 killed.
Rockets and drones target US embassy in Baghdad in most intense attack since Iran war began.
Israeli strike killed Iran's Supreme National Security Council head Ali Larijani and paramilitary commander
Israeli attack on Iran's offshore South Pars gasfield threatens Gulf energy infrastructure

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths

ukraine.text: Ukraine Ready to Defend Americans 'Without Second Thought' in Iran War
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelensky
ukraine.title: Ukrainian President

middle_east.text: Iran will continue to resist attack by the US armed forces until US President Donald Trump realizes that the conflict he initiated was a mistake and must never be repeated
middle_east.speaker: Abbas Araghchi
middle_east.title: Iranian Foreign Minister

middle_east.text: Will hit enemy where it least expects
middle_east.speaker: Rear Admiral Shahram Irani
middle_east.title: Iranian Navy Commander

middle_east.text: US had $10 million prize on Larijani's head, we did it for free
middle_east.speaker: Gideon Sa'ar
middle_east.title: Israeli Minister

observers.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz ruled out military participation in Strait of Hormuz mission, emphasizing NATO is a defense alliance not intervention alliance.
UK agreeing new defense partnership with Ukraine to boost drone production and global defensive capability. PM Starmer meeting Zelensky in London.
US Treasury Secretary rejected reports that Trump threatened to delay China visit over Hormuz Strait assistance request.
Prime Minister Bart De Wever urged European authorities to negotiate directly with Russia. European leaders beginning to admit need for productive dialogue with Moscow over Ukraine conflict.
US reportedly diverted South Korean missile shield systems to support Iran war operations. The redeployment shows geopolitical ripple effects of Middle East conflict extending to East Asia.

financial.brent_crude: Rising on Strait of Hormuz closure
financial.notes: US stocks gained as investors bought the dip despite Iran war escalation, while gold prices held steady despite war uncertainty.

update_log.text: Iran threatens to strike Gulf energy facilities after South Pars gasfield attack
Israeli defense minister confirms killing of Iran security chief Ali Larijani in overnight strike
Israel launches new ground operations in Lebanon displacing nearly one million people
US counterterrorism director Joe Kent resigns over Iran war citing lack of imminent threat
Pakistan conducted deadly airstrikes on Kabul hospital, Afghanistan claims 400 killed
Iranian missiles hit central Israel's Ramat Gan area killing 2 people
Israel launches ground offensive in Lebanon as airstrikes hit central Beirut
Iran sets UAE gas field ablaze in escalating energy infrastructure attacks
Most intense rocket and drone attack on US embassy Baghdad since Iran war began
